title: Tempting Russian Apple Bake
description: A nutty and molten Russian dish perfect for a lazy Sunday, featuring vanilla bean paste and a crispy topping. This dessert is sure to become a family favorite.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the sliced apples, vanilla bean paste, and brown sugar, and toss until the apples are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, rolled oats, chopped walnuts, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Add the melted butter to the dry ingredients and stir until the mixture is crumbly.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish and top with the crumbly mixture.
Bake for 40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
